page_metadata.biotools__summary: ReviewR is a portable tool to help you explore data across different data models. Within ReviewR, you can browse patient data stored in either the OMOP or MIMIC-III data model.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ReviewR is a portable tool to help you explore data across different data models. Within ReviewR, you can browse patient data stored in either the OMOP or MIMIC-III data model.
